BL-615 — Orphaned .claim-progress.json sidecars accumulate in inbox/in_process with no matching handoff
What it solves: e2e QA procedure: seed a scratch role inbox/in_process with (a) a real
handoff + sidecar and (b) a sidecar with no matching handoff. Complete (a)
via done_with_current.sh and verify no sidecar remains for it; run the
sweep once and verify (b) is deleted with a reap log line. Then confirm
the 4 hist…
Approval context: Low-priority cleanup defect from the coordinator's 2026-07-24 bug report (tertiary observation). Approve if a leak-diagnosis plus orphan-reap backstop is worth a small coder parcel; reject to live with occasional stray sidecar files (they are cosmetic today, but they also satisfied "mailbox looks e…
BL-615 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-615" (or "reject BL-615 <reason>") to act.
